description:
Demonstrates all OData-specific selectors in a single overlay.

This example shows:
- namespace: Schema-level annotations
- entityType: EntityType definitions
- complexType: ComplexType definitions (OData-specific)
- enumType: EnumType definitions (OData-specific)
- propertyType: Properties, navigation properties, and enum members
- entitySet: EntitySets in EntityContainer
- operation: Actions and Functions
- parameter: Action/Function parameters
- returnType: Action/Function return types

data.@Core.LongDescription: Provides comprehensive HR management capabilities including employee records, leave management, and organizational structure.

@Capabilities.InsertRestrictions.Description: New employees must be created through the onboarding workflow.

data.@Core.Description: Employee master record containing personal and employment information.
data.@Core.LongDescription: The Employee entity is the central data object for HR management. It contains identification data, personal information, employment details, and relationships to organizational units.

DateOfBirth.@Core.Description: Employee's date of birth. Personal data - handle according to privacy regulations.

data.@Core.Description: Postal address structure used across employee and organizational data.

Terminated.@Core.Description: Employment relationship has ended. Employee records are retained for legal compliance.

data.@Core.Description: Terminates an employee's contract effective from the specified date.
data.@Core.LongDescription: This action initiates the offboarding process. It requires HR Manager authorization and triggers downstream processes including payroll adjustments and access revocation.

data.@Core.Description: The date when the termination becomes effective. Must be in the future.
Returns the updated employee record with termination details.
Retrieves all employees who directly report to the specified manager.
The employee ID of the manager whose direct reports should be returned.
Collection of Employee entities representing the manager's direct reports.
